args.query:
SELECT Id, AccountId, ContactId, CloseDate, StageName
FROM Opportunity
WHERE REPLACE(ContactId,'#','') = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR'
  AND CloseDate >= DATE '2021-06-01' AND CloseDate < DATE '2021-07-01';

exec_args.sql:
SELECT Id, AccountId, ContactId, CloseDate, StageName
FROM Opportunity
WHERE REPLACE(ContactId,'#','') = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR'
  AND CloseDate >= DATE '2021-06-01' AND CloseDate < DATE '2021-07-01';

args.query:
SELECT o.Id AS OrderId, o.AccountId, o.EffectiveDate, oi.Product2Id
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON oi.OrderId = o.Id
WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01';

exec_args.sql:
SELECT o.Id AS OrderId, o.AccountId, o.EffectiveDate, oi.Product2Id
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON oi.OrderId = o.Id
WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01';

args.query: SELECT Id, AccountId FROM Contact WHERE REPLACE(Id,'#','')='003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR';

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, AccountId FROM Contact WHERE REPLACE(Id,'#','')='003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR';

args.query:
SELECT o.Id AS OrderId, o.AccountId, o.EffectiveDate, oi.Product2Id, p.Name AS ProductName
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON oi.OrderId = o.Id
JOIN Product2 p ON p.Id = oi.Product2Id
WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01'
  AND REPLACE(o.AccountId,'#','') = '001Wt00000PGXrNIAX'
  AND LOWER(p.Name) LIKE '%ai%';

exec_args.sql:
SELECT o.Id AS OrderId, o.AccountId, o.EffectiveDate, oi.Product2Id, p.Name AS ProductName
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON oi.OrderId = o.Id
JOIN Product2 p ON p.Id = oi.Product2Id
WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01'
  AND REPLACE(o.AccountId,'#','') = '001Wt00000PGXrNIAX'
  AND LOWER(p.Name) LIKE '%ai%';

args.query:
SELECT o.Id AS OrderId, o.AccountId, o.EffectiveDate, oi.Product2Id, p.Name AS ProductName
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON oi.OrderId = o.Id
JOIN Product2 p ON p.Id = oi.Product2Id
WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01'
  AND REPLACE(o.AccountId,'#','') = '001Wt00000PGXrNIAX'
  AND (LOWER(p.Name) LIKE '%processing unit%' OR LOWER(p.Name) LIKE '%apu%');

exec_args.sql:
SELECT o.Id AS OrderId, o.AccountId, o.EffectiveDate, oi.Product2Id, p.Name AS ProductName
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON oi.OrderId = o.Id
JOIN Product2 p ON p.Id = oi.Product2Id
WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01'
  AND REPLACE(o.AccountId,'#','') = '001Wt00000PGXrNIAX'
  AND (LOWER(p.Name) LIKE '%processing unit%' OR LOWER(p.Name) LIKE '%apu%');
